name: Laptop Pro X1
shortDescription: 15.6" 4K powerhouse with Intel i9 and 32GB RAM for professionals.
description: The Laptop Pro X1 is our flagship professional laptop, engineered for demanding workloads. Featuring a stunning 15.6-inch 4K OLED display, the latest Intel Core i9 processor, and 32GB of DDR5 RAM, it delivers uncompromising performance whether you're editing 4K video, running complex simulations, or multitasking across dozens of applications. The 1TB NVMe SSD ensures lightning-fast boot times and file transfers, while the all-day battery keeps you productive on the go.
features: Thunderbolt 4 x 2, USB-C x 1, USB-A x 2

specifications.Processor: Intel Core i9-14900H (14 cores, up to 5.8GHz)
specifications.Storage: 1TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe SSD (2nd M.2 slot available)
specifications.Ports: 2x Thunderbolt 4, 1x USB-C 3.2, 2x USB-A 3.2, 1x HDMI 2.1, 1x SD card reader, 1x 3.5mm audio

name: Wireless Earbuds Z5
shortDescription: Premium ANC earbuds with 40-hour battery and crystal-clear audio.
description: Experience audio perfection with the Wireless Earbuds Z5. Equipped with advanced Active Noise Cancellation, custom 11mm dynamic drivers, and Bluetooth 5.3 for rock-solid connectivity. The ergonomic design ensures a comfortable fit for all-day wear, while the charging case provides up to 40 hours of total battery life. Whether you're commuting, working out, or taking calls, the Z5 delivers studio-quality sound everywhere you go.
features: Custom 11mm dynamic drivers with Hi-Res Audio
6 microphones with AI noise reduction for calls
Available in Midnight Black and Pearl White

name: Smart Watch S3
shortDescription: Advanced health monitoring smartwatch with AMOLED display and 5ATM water resistance.
description: The Smart Watch S3 is your ultimate health and fitness companion. Its vibrant 1.43" AMOLED display delivers crystal-clear visuals, while comprehensive health sensors track heart rate, blood oxygen, sleep quality, and stress levels 24/7. With 5ATM water resistance, built-in GPS, and over 100 sport modes, it's ready for any adventure. Smart notifications, music control, and contactless payments keep you connected without reaching for your phone.
features: Heart rate, SpO2, stress & sleep monitoring

specifications.Sensors: Optical heart rate, SpO2, accelerometer, gyroscope, barometer, compass, ambient light, temperature

name: Portable Speaker M8
shortDescription: 360-degree immersive sound with IPX7 waterproofing and 20-hour battery.
description: Take the party anywhere with the Portable Speaker M8. Delivering powerful 360-degree sound from a compact, rugged design, this speaker is built for adventure. Its IPX7 waterproof rating means it can handle rain, splashes, and even submersion. With 20 hours of battery life and the ability to pair two speakers for stereo sound, the M8 is the perfect companion for beach days, camping trips, or backyard gatherings.

name: 4K Monitor U27
shortDescription: 27" 4K IPS monitor with 144Hz, USB-C and HDR600 for creators and gamers.
description: The 4K Monitor U27 bridges the gap between professional color accuracy and gaming performance. Its 27-inch IPS panel delivers stunning 4K resolution at 144Hz, making it equally suited for color-critical work and smooth gaming. HDR600 certification ensures vivid, lifelike imagery, while the 65W USB-C connection charges your laptop and transfers video over a single cable. With factory-calibrated 99% sRGB and 95% DCI-P3 coverage, what you see is what you get.
features: Height adjustable, pivot, swivel, tilt stand

specifications.Ports: 1x DisplayPort 1.4, 2x HDMI 2.1, 1x USB-C (65W PD), 4x USB-A 3.0 hub, 1x 3.5mm audio out
specifications.Adaptive Sync: AMD FreeSync Premium Pro, NVIDIA G-Sync Compatible

name: Mechanical Keyboard K7
shortDescription: Hot-swappable wireless mechanical keyboard with RGB and tri-mode connectivity.
description: The Mechanical Keyboard K7 redefines the typing experience with hot-swappable switches, per-key RGB lighting, and tri-mode wireless connectivity. Switch seamlessly between Bluetooth (up to 3 devices), 2.4GHz wireless, and wired USB-C. The gasket-mount design delivers a satisfying, thocky typing feel, while the PBT double-shot keycaps ensure legends that never fade. With a compact 75% layout and dedicated volume knob, it's the perfect blend of form and function.
